title: NIT Rourkela – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts
shortInfo: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with M.Tech/ME/M.S, B.Tech/BE Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 19-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Rourkela official website nitrkl.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with M.Tech/ME/M.S, B.Tech/BE Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 19-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Rourkela official website nitrkl.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 28 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female, 3 years for OBC)

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/ME/M.S. in Electrical/Control Engineering/Energy Engg. or equivalent, relevant to the area of research OR B.Tech/BE in Electrical/Control Engineering or equivalent Engineering, and having a CGPA/CPI score of 7.00 (out of 10.0) and above with a valid GATE score in M.Tech and B.Tech.

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 37,000.00/- per month (Year 1 & 2) and INR 42,000.00/- per month (Year 3)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: National Institute of Technology Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026
